cancellations_removed.note: Invoices prefixed 'C' are cancellations/returns — excluded from demand.

non_product_rows_removed.note: Fees/postage/adjustment codes and non-numeric codes are not sellable SKUs.

missing_field_rows_removed.note: Rows missing date, quantity, price or SKU cannot be used and are dropped.

non_positive_rows_removed.note: Quantity<=0 or price<=0 are returns/adjustments/freebies, not demand.

duplicate_rows_removed.note: Identical invoice/SKU/time/qty/price lines are double-scans — de-duplicated.

rows_clean.note: Retained 94.0% of raw rows after cleaning.

skus_modelled.note: Forecast scope = top 200 SKUs by volume (the active assortment).

skus_after_min_history.note: SKUs with >= 30 weeks of history kept for modelling.

inventory_snapshots_modelled.note: Raw extract has no stock table; inventory snapshot synthesised from demand (seeded).
